data.title: Metaspacex Probes Lender-Driven Sale of Controlling Shareholder’s Stock
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Yield Go Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:1796) ) has issued an announcement.

Metaspacex Limited has disclosed that its controlling shareholder, China Sports Assets Management Limited, saw 102,288,000 shares sold on the market between 2 April and 9 April 2026 by its lender under a lending agreement, allegedly without China Sports’ authorisation, to meet repayment obligations. The company is now investigating the identities of the buyers and any potential concert-party or connected-person relationships to ensure compliance with Hong Kong listing and takeover rules, while maintaining that it is not a party to the lending arrangement, that its operations and governance remain unaffected, and that China Sports still holds about 53.3% of its issued shares.

More about Yield Go Holdings Ltd.

Metaspacex Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands whose shares trade on the Main Board under stock code 1796. The group operates through various subsidiaries, with China Sports Assets Management Limited serving as its controlling shareholder, ultimately wholly owned by Ms. Huang Hou.

Average Trading Volume: 4,608,448

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$316.8M

data.title: National Storage REIT Sets Date for Crucial Court Hearing on Brookfield-GIC Takeover
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

National Storage REIT ( (AU:NSR) ) has shared an announcement.

National Storage REIT has outlined the timing and mechanics of a key court hearing tied to its proposed acquisition by a Brookfield- and GIC-backed consortium via interlinked share and trust schemes. The second court hearing, scheduled for 21 April 2026 in the Supreme Court of New South Wales, is contingent on securityholder approval at meetings on 15 April and the satisfaction or waiver of other remaining conditions, and will determine whether the schemes can proceed to implementation.

The REIT has confirmed that its securityholders are entitled to appear at the second court hearing to support or oppose approval of the schemes, underscoring that this stage remains a critical procedural step before the transaction can be finalised. The notice signals that, while the acquisition process is advancing, completion still depends on judicial approval and any objections raised, keeping the outcome and timeline under close watch for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NSR) stock is a Hold with a A$2.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on National Storage REIT stock, see the AU:NSR Stock Forecast page.

More about National Storage REIT

National Storage REIT is the largest self-storage provider in Australia and New Zealand, operating more than 290 locations that deliver tailored storage solutions to over 100,000 residential and commercial customers. It is the first independent, internally managed and fully integrated self-storage owner and operator to list on the Australian Securities Exchange, giving it a prominent position in the regional storage market.

Average Trading Volume: 7,304,091

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$3.92B

An announcement from Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2190) ) is now available.

Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology has granted 400,000 share options under its 2025 Share Incentive Scheme to a single employee of the Group, with an exercise price of HK$23.472 per H share and a validity period extending to October 23, 2035. The options will vest in a single tranche on or before December 31, 2028, subject to minimum 12-month vesting, performance conditions tied to the relevant subsidiary’s financial results and the individual’s evaluation, and a lock-up that lasts until the earlier of three months after the Company holds 100% of Optimed Medizinische Instrumente GmbH or December 31, 2028, aligning employee incentives with operational performance and strategic integration of its German subsidiary.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2190) stock is a Buy with a HK$28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:2190 Stock Forecast page.

More about Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology Co., Ltd. Class H

Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology Co., Ltd. is a PRC-incorporated medical technology company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2190. The Group develops and markets medical devices, with operations that include overseas subsidiaries such as Optimed Medizinische Instrumente GmbH, reflecting a focus on international expansion in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Westpac strengthens balance sheet and provisions amid geopolitical uncertainty
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Westpac Banking ( (AU:WBC) ) is now available.

Westpac Banking Corporation reported that it remains in a strong financial position to support customers despite heightened geopolitical uncertainty and energy-driven inflation pressures. In the first half of 2026, the bank delivered solid balance sheet growth in lending and deposits, stable core net interest margins, lower expenses from productivity initiatives, improved asset quality, and a stronger CET1 capital ratio.

Management flagged that increased market volatility and a weaker New Zealand dollar weighed on Treasury and Markets net interest margin and translated revenues and costs. Reflecting a more challenging economic outlook, Westpac has raised credit provisions, including a new overlay for energy‑intensive sectors, and expects higher credit impairment charges, while also progressing the sale of its RAMS mortgage portfolio, which incurred a notable transaction cost that reduced reported profit ahead of the half‑year results due in early May 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:WBC) stock is a Hold with a A$34.88 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Westpac Banking stock, see the AU:WBC Stock Forecast page.

More about Westpac Banking

Westpac Banking Corporation is one of Australia’s major banks, providing retail, business and institutional banking services across Australia and New Zealand. The group focuses on lending, deposit-taking, treasury and markets activities, and maintains a strong capital position to support customers through economic and geopolitical volatility.

YTD Price Performance: 10.80%

Average Trading Volume: 4,683,246

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$146.1B

data.title: Boundless Bio Terminates Major Long-Term San Diego Lease
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Boundless Bio Inc. ( (BOLD) ).

On April 13, 2026, Boundless Bio, Inc. agreed to terminate its lease for approximately 80,168 square feet of laboratory and office space at 10955 Alexandria Way in San Diego, a lease that had originally been scheduled to run through October 31, 2034. Under the termination agreement with landlord ARE-10933 North Torrey Pines, LLC, the lease will end effective May 31, 2026, and the deal became effective once the landlord secured a replacement tenant for the premises.

As part of the arrangement, Boundless Bio will pay a $10 million lease modification fee and forfeit its roughly $0.5 million security deposit, representing a meaningful cash outlay to exit the long-term commitment. The move alters the company’s future facilities footprint and long-term lease obligations, with financial and operational implications for how it houses its laboratory and office functions going forward.

The most recent analyst rating on (BOLD) stock is a Buy with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Boundless Bio Inc. stock, see the BOLD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BOLD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BOLD is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance typical of an early-stage, pre-revenue biotech (large ongoing losses and negative free cash flow despite some improvement). Technicals are broadly neutral to mildly positive, but valuation support is limited given negative earnings and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on BOLD stock, click here.

More about Boundless Bio Inc.

Boundless Bio, Inc. is a biotechnology company that operates laboratory and office facilities in San Diego, California, supporting its research and development activities in the life sciences sector. The company’s operations depend on specialized leased lab and office space to conduct its scientific and corporate work.

data.title: Sterling Metals Sells Sail Pond Project to Refocus on Core Copper Assets
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sterling Metals ( (TSE:SAG) ) just unveiled an update.

Sterling Metals Corp. has agreed to sell a 100% interest in its Sail Pond project to an arm’s length purchaser in exchange for 96,078 common shares of the buyer, shifting value from the asset into an equity stake. Completion of the transaction is contingent on regulatory approvals, including from the TSX Venture Exchange, and the shares issued will be subject to a four-month-plus-one-day statutory hold period under applicable securities laws.

The sale effectively streamlines Sterling’s portfolio around its core Canadian copper-focused assets, the Soo Copper and Adeline projects, which have shown potential for significant new copper discoveries. By converting the Sail Pond property into purchaser equity while concentrating on large-scale copper opportunities, Sterling aims to sharpen its strategic focus and potentially enhance its positioning within the Canadian mineral exploration sector.

Spark’s Take on SAG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SAG is a Neutral.

Score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and ongoing cash burn). Support comes from strong price trend/momentum and positive project/financing events that extend runway, but valuation remains constrained by loss-making results and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on SAG stock, click here.

More about Sterling Metals

Sterling Metals Corp. is a Toronto-based mineral exploration company focused on large-scale, high-grade Canadian projects. It is advancing the 25,000-hectare Soo Copper Project in Ontario, which hosts past production and multiple breccia and porphyry targets near established infrastructure, and the 29,000-hectare Adeline Project in Labrador, covering a sediment-hosted copper belt with significant silver credits.

The company positions itself as a pioneer in exploring mineral-rich regions of Canada and emphasizes responsible engagement with Indigenous communities. At its Soo Copper project, Sterling conducts exploration on the traditional lands of the First Nations of the North Shore of Lake Superior and has committed to respectful, transparent and inclusive relationships with Indigenous Peoples.

Average Trading Volume: 107,218

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$64.74M

Find detailed analytics on SAG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

CES Energy Solutions Corp. will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after markets close on May 7, 2026, and hold a conference call the following morning, May 8, at 9:00 a.m. MT, led by President and CEO Ken Zinger. The call, accessible by webcast and telephone with a replay available for 90 days, underscores the company’s ongoing commitment to transparent communication with investors as it seeks to capitalize on growing demand for drilling fluids and production chemicals in North America.

By facilitating broad access to its quarterly update, CES is aiming to keep stakeholders closely informed about its financial performance and strategic progress in the competitive oilfield chemistry market. The move aligns with its asset-light, cash-generative business model, which positions the company to respond efficiently to shifts in oilfield activity and demand across drilling, completion, production, and midstream segments.

CEA Industries ( (BNC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 13, 2026, CEA Industries announced that its stapled warrants to purchase common stock at an exercise price of $15.15 per share have been approved for listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. Trading in the warrants, which will carry the ticker symbol BNCWZ, is scheduled to begin on April 15, 2026, marking a new avenue for investors to gain leveraged exposure to the company’s equity.

The stapled warrants, originally issued under a 2025 securities purchase agreement and governed by an August 5, 2025 warrant agreement, total 49,504,988 outstanding units. Each warrant entitles the holder to buy one share of common stock until August 5, 2028, a move that could influence the company’s capital structure over time and offers existing and prospective stakeholders an additional instrument for participating in its growth strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (BNC) stock is a Buy with a $29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CEA Industries stock, see the BNC Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BNC is a Neutral.

The score is anchored by improved TTM financial strength (cash generation and low leverage), but is pulled down by weak underlying operating profitability and a clearly bearish technical trend. Corporate events are mixed, adding governance improvements alongside elevated control/strategy uncertainty, while valuation provides limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on BNC stock, click here.

More about CEA Industries

CEA Industries Inc., which trades on Nasdaq under the ticker BNC, is a growth-oriented company focused on building category-leading businesses in consumer markets. data.title: Collective Mining Sets June 15, 2026 Date for Annual and Special Shareholder Meeting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Collective Mining ( (TSE:CNL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Collective Mining has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission dated April 13, 2026, to notify investors of key dates for its upcoming annual and special meeting of security holders. The filing confirms that TSX Trust Company has sent a Notice of Record and Meeting Dates to the Canadian Depository for Securities, formalizing the process for shareholder participation.

The annual and special meeting is scheduled for June 15, 2026, with May 8, 2026 set as the record date for notice, voting, and beneficial ownership determination, and only holders of common shares will be entitled to receive notice and vote. Collective Mining will not use notice-and-access for proxy materials, and has opted to send materials directly to non-objecting beneficial owners while also paying for the delivery of materials to objecting beneficial owners, signaling an effort to ensure broad shareholder engagement in upcoming corporate decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CNL) stock is a Buy with a C$29.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Collective Mining stock, see the TSE:CNL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CNL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CNL is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financial performance: a strong, low-debt balance sheet is offset by being pre-revenue with widening losses and significant negative free cash flow. Technicals add support due to a strong uptrend and positive momentum, while valuation remains a drag because earnings are negative and there is no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on CNL stock, click here.

More about Collective Mining

Collective Mining Ltd. is a Canadian-listed company that files as a foreign private issuer with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and reports under Form 40-F. The company’s common shares are the primary class of securities referenced for investor voting and meeting-related matters in North American capital markets.

data.title: Green Cross Health Confirms Talks on Potential Medical Division Deal
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Green Cross Health ( (NZ:GXH) ) has issued an announcement.

Green Cross Health, a major New Zealand primary healthcare operator across pharmacies and medical centres, has confirmed it is in discussions with third parties about a potential transaction involving its Medical division. The company, which runs the Unichem, Life Pharmacy and The Doctors brands, continues to focus on accessible and sustainable healthcare nationwide.

The board’s acknowledgment follows an Australian media report suggesting a possible sale of the Medical division, though the company stresses there is no certainty any deal will proceed. Any transaction could materially reshape Green Cross Health’s portfolio and strategic focus, and the company has pledged to keep shareholders informed under its continuous disclosure obligations.

More about Green Cross Health

Green Cross Health is a New Zealand primary healthcare provider operating multidisciplinary teams to deliver sustainable healthcare solutions and positive patient experiences. Through its Unichem, Life Pharmacy and The Doctors brands, it runs more than 300 pharmacies across almost all New Zealand communities and 65 medical centres serving over 400,000 enrolled patients.
